reviews.review_text: Lovely little caravan Park
Great little family park

Port Clinton was good first time being there the locals are all friendly good sincere lovely place to go visit usually always go to Coobowie but change things up and was happy goodtime away will be back in the future and they got a community pool which is good if you want to do some swimming.
Stayed for 3 nights , found the facilities to be clean and tidy and the hospitality just perfect, would recommend to anyone 👍thank you Dusty see you again for sure

Perfect. Stated 4 nights in cabin, very clean neat and tidy, everything we needed.
Great views overlooking the beach, well kept grounds.
Obliging friendly hosts, very reasonable rates.
Enjoyable walks around quirky, interesting town, or walk the trails.
It’s a 10 from us!!
If you want a quiet place for peace and relax this is your spot friendly staff clean welcome service animals
Cute small cabin in front of the beach and great staff. Thank you Dusty!

Beautiful little caravan park with its great location with metres from the beautiful beach and picturesque views of the bay. Absolutely a place to visit and stay. Very neat and tidy with friendly staff. Would recommend this hidden little gem.
Great spot right on the beach, great for crabbing and fishing
Great place to relax and a helpful manager clean and quiet
so loverly
We used a Caravan site in the foreshore. Was lovely, cross the road to the beach, not a swimming beach but the perfect spot for a lovely getaway a short distance from town
Great caravan park very clean n tidy awesome spot   Dusty n Dianne & Co very friendly one of the nicest spots we have stayed
Need a quiet place to go this is the place,catch some crabs in peace while you rest from technology.
We had the best time over New Years here with our family. It's peaceful and right ontop of the beach!
Lucky to get a site 20m.from the beach. Pet friendly, clean amenities, friendly staff and locals as well.don't forget to go raking for crabs if that is your thing.
Love this place .....
Great proced cabin, really clean. Beautiful service , good fishing. A fun stay thankyou.
Absolutely 10 out of 10, is excellent!! Friendly, helpful and professional Park Manager! The location is beautiful! Thank you, cheers.
Great location we had a front water site literally across the road from the water

Fabulous park opposite beach. Super friendly manager and staff. We had a small tent, able to park in the shade. We then were able to put our car in the parks secured area. |Facilities clean and tidy. |Dusty and Dianne helped us out of a tight spot. We had to shorten our holiday and Dianne organised a car to collect us from the WTY track. |Thank you. Sue
Wonderful park with fantastic managers who go out of their way to accommodate and ensure you thoroughly enjoy your stay 😀

Beach front Cabin, clean & tidy, Sea views & the best shower ever, the pressure was unbelievable, management & staff more than helpful & I would highly recommend to all  yes we'll definitely be back 😀

Dusty is an absolute champ and park manager. Chilled vibes all through park, very very clean toilet block.
Nice grass sites with plenty of room.
Shame the beach is pretty average, but park is a little hidden gem for value and amenities.
Very clean and friendly place. We will be back Dusty. Thank you for your efforts. It’s a credit to you

one of the quietest caravan parks we,ve stayed at and cheapest at $35. Good atmosphere, friendly service, good spot for a stay over .
not much beach as the tide goes right out. check out the community center for a meal and a beer, as its highly recommended.
Great location with a great sunset

We spent Easter on the front grass with family. It was tough going for crabs but we got enough for a meal.
Update still in great Oct 23. Dusty the manager is brilliant squeezed us in for a few extra days as we decided to stay longer.👌
Great little hidden secret will be back great locals in park very helpful info
Great place to relax
